channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Four Killed in Two Separate Avalanches in Northwestern British Columbia
item.description: Four people lost their lives in two separate avalanches that struck northwestern British Columbia on Sunday, March 23, 2026. According to the RCMP, three heli-skiers were killed when an avalanche occu...

item.title: LPG Shortage Hits Migrant Workers, Raising Cost of Living and Food Insecurity
item.description: Migrant workers in cities like Manesar, Noida, and South Delhi are facing severe difficulties due to the ongoing LPG shortage. With cylinders running out, many cannot cook meals at home and rely on lo...

item.title: Commission Report Offers Hope for Reconciliation and Unity in Tanzania
item.description: Rais Samia Suluhu Hassan imekwishawapokea matokeo ya tume ya utafiti kuhusu matukio ya tarehe 29 Oktoba, 2025. Analysts na wasomi wamesema wana tumaini kuwa ripoti hii itafunua sababu za msingi za mat...

item.title: Dangote Warns Tinubu on How Middle East Crisis Fit Affect Africa’s Economy
item.description: Aliko Dangote, wey be chairman of Dangote Group, don raise serious concern about how the wahala for Middle East fit affect oil prices and cause harder times for African countries. After e meet Preside...

item.title: Understanding the Psychological Roots of Silence in Alleged Abuse by Cesar Chavez
item.description: The Conversation article explores why multiple women who accused Mexican American civil rights leader Cesar Chavez of sexual abuse waited decades before speaking publicly. The allegations, uncovered b...

item.title: NTSB Provides Update on Air Canada Crash at LaGuardia Airport
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) held a press conference on Monday evening to provide an update on the investigation into the Air Canada crash at LaGuardia Airport in New York City. The...

item.title: Trump Announces Pause on Iran Strikes Amid Conflicting Reports of Negotiations
item.description: On March 23-24, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump announced a five-day postponement of strikes on Iranian power plants, citing 'very good' talks with an unnamed Iranian official. Trump suggested that ...

item.title: Coach Baker Urges Simba to Improve Finishing Against TRA United
item.description: In preparation for a key Tanzania Premier League fixture, Simba SC Head Coach Steve Baker has called on his team to be sharper in front of goal as they face TRA United in Dar es Salaam. Baker recognis...

item.title: Local councils defy government directives on housing development
item.description: A recent investigation by Sky News has revealed widespread tension between local councils in England and the government over planning approvals, highlighting resistance to the national target of build...

item.title: Seedance 2.0 AI Shows Potential in Film Creation, But Challenges Remain

item.title: DepEd Defends Shift to Three-Term School Calendar for SY 2026–2027
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) clarified its decision to shift to a three-term school calendar starting School Year 2026–2027, emphasizing that the reform aims to improve learning continuity and ...

item.title: Man accused of impersonation and N1.8 million fraud faces court in Lagos

item.title: Iran Rejects Trump’s Claim of Talks Amid Tensions and Delayed US Strikes
item.description: The Iranian government has denied United States President Donald Trump’s claim that secret negotiations were underway between Washington and Tehran. Trump announced that he was postponing a planned st...

item.title: PSC commissioners accused of defying court order in DPP removal process
item.description: Commissioners from the Public Service Commission (PSC), led by chairman Francis Meja, are facing possible contempt of court charges after allegedly ignoring an active order from the High Court in Kisu...

item.title: Sgt Fannie Nkosi confirms cash found in safe during police raid amid investigation
item.description: During proceedings at the Madlanga commission, Sgt Fannie Nkosi confirmed that police discovered R385,175 in cash stashed in a safe at his home during a raid in October last year. The search was origi...

item.title: South Africa Reaffirms Commitment to Advancing Gender Equality and Women's Empowerment
item.description: South Africa has reaffirmed its commitment to turning international gender equality pledges into concrete national actions. At the 70th session of the Commission on the Status of Women (CSW70) in New ...

item.title: Tanzanians Praised for Unity and Discipline During Ramadan and Eid Celebrations
item.description: Across Tanzania, the recent Ramadan period displayed a deep sense of unity, discipline, and mutual respect among citizens of all backgrounds. The calm and safety on the streets were not accidental but...
